description: Structured delta report emitted by Evolve delta_analyzer. Maps Oracle hindsight findings to specific dossier and doctrine mutations.
purpose: This contract defines `evolve_delta_report`, the primary Evolve artifact. It bridges Oracle critique outputs to actionable substrate mutations with full provenance.

status.constraint: Exactly AVAILABLE when the artifact exists.

run_pair.constraint: Must reference the Oracle run that produced the inputs.

dossier_deltas.constraint: Non-empty when actionable changes exist. Empty array if Oracle found no actionable patterns.

doctrine_flags.constraint: May be empty. Each flag must cite evidence from at least one Oracle artifact.

learning_entries.constraint: Non-empty. Compact learning statements for the ledger.

root_failure_mode.constraint: Primary error class from cp2_critique. Must be a valid error_class enum value.

error_class_distribution.constraint: Keys are error_class enum values, values are integer counts.

directional_accuracy.constraint: From prediction_reconciliation.summary: {correct: int, incorrect: int, total: int}.

regime_classification.constraint: From realized_hindsight_brief: dominant realized regime descriptor.

systematic_patterns.constraint: Non-empty. Each entry is a concise pattern statement citing specific Oracle findings.

lane.constraint: Uppercase lane label: STOCK, ETF, MACRO, SPINE.

dossier_path.constraint: Repo-relative path to the target dossier file.

operations.constraint: Non-empty. Ordered list of proposed CRUD operations.

type.constraint: Operation type for this dossier key.

value.constraint: Required for CREATE and UPDATE. The proposed new value or merge payload.

rationale.constraint: Must cite the Oracle artifact and field that motivated this change.

source_artifact.constraint: The Oracle artifact (or Lab CP2) that motivated this change.

source_field.constraint: Specific field or path within the source artifact.

description.constraint: Concise description of the proposed doctrine change.

evidence_runs.constraint: Non-empty list of run pair ids that support this flag.

severity.constraint: Based on frequency and magnitude of the pattern.

dossier_target_allowlist.description: Canonical lane-to-dossier mapping. Reject dossier_path values not in this list.

evidence_gates.description: Minimum evidence thresholds before mutations are committed. Prevents overfitting to single runs.
rules: CREATE operations on new top-level sections require severity >= MEDIUM or explicit human approval.
DELETE operations always require explicit human approval regardless of evidence.
UPDATE operations with a single source_field from a single run may be committed directly only if severity is LOW (cosmetic correction).
Doctrine flags require at least 2 evidence_runs before severity can be raised to HIGH.
If multiple dossier operations target the same key with contradictory values, emit a conflict_detected flag and require human review.

validation_rules: Every dossier_delta must target a dossier_path in the dossier_target_allowlist.
Every dossier_operation must cite a source_artifact and source_field.
CREATE and UPDATE operations require non-null value; DELETE operations require value to be null or omitted.
doctrine_flags must have at least one evidence_run.
learning_entries must be non-empty (always something to learn).
error_class_distribution keys must match oracle_error_taxonomy.json mechanisms.

dossier_updater.role: Converts dossier_deltas into unified patch vocabulary for version_committer.
